channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: What is Bluesky, the 'up-and-coming' social platform seen as X alternative
item.description: Bluesky, a new social platform garnering millions of users, is now competing with top networks like X and Truth Social. Jack Dorsey, a former CEO at Twitter, created the site in 2019 to be “a protocol for public conversation.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Home entertainment holiday gift ideas at a discount
item.description: The industry buzz is we will see repeats between now and Christmas so if you miss the deal first time around, keep checking.
item.dc:creator: Tribune News Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Senate Democrat defends Vindman against Musk's 'treason' threat
item.description: Sen. Tim Kaine (D-Va.) hit Elon Musk for suggesting in a post on his social platform X on Wednesday that retired Army Lt.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, The Hill

item.title: How I turned my blog into a social media hub
item.description: A few months ago, I decided to start blogging again. Even with steady freelance work and a couple of tech advice newsletters, I missed having my own little place on the web to write about any topic I pleased, free from the limits and vagaries of social media.
item.dc:creator: Jared Newman, Fast Company

item.title: UK Cabinet member resigns over past phone fraud case
item.description: A member of the U.K. Cabinet has resigned after reports revealed she was convicted in a fraud case more than a decade ago.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Cryptocurrency entrepreneur who bought banana art for $6.2 million eats the fruit in Hong Kong
item.description: A cryptocurrency entrepreneur who had bought a piece of conceptual art consisting of a simple banana, duct-taped to a wall, for $6.2 million last week ate the fruit in Hong Kong on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Kanis Leung, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Krugman: Hostility to immigrants will hurt America’s tech sector
item.description: If Trump follows through on anti-immigration pledges, the sweeps likely won't spare legal, highly educated workers.
item.dc:creator: Paul Krugman, The Mercury News

item.title: Python 3.14 is a rational constant
item.description: This (half-) month in Python and elsewhere: Get your feet wet with Pi-thon, er, Python 3.14, in its alpha 2 release! See how standalone Python app executables work with PyInstaller. Use Python’s pattern matching to unlock type-based decision-making superpowers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Canada sues Google over alleged anticompetitive practices in online ads
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Canada's antitrust watchdog said Thursday it is suing Google over alleged anticompetitive conduct in the tech giant’s online advertising business and wants the company to sell off two of its ad tech services and pay a penalty.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Joshua trees are in peril. California has a plan to save them
item.description: The California Department of Fish and Wildlife has released a new plan to protect the state’s iconic Joshua trees, which are imperiled by wildfires, human development and climate change.
item.dc:creator: Dorany Pineda, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Australia Bans Social Media for Children Under 16
item.description: Australia passes law restricting social media use for children under 16, with fines up to $32 million for non-compliance.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Uber branches out into AI data labeling
item.description: Uber no longer offers just rides and deliveries: It’s created a new division hiring out gig workers to help enterprises with some of their AI model development work.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Spotify playlists are being hijacked to promote pirated software and scams
item.description: Spammers have found a way to target Spotify playlists and podcasts to push pirated software, cheat codes for games and spam links and malware sites.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Haberman suggests Trump-Musk partnership 'could last' despite criticisms
item.description: National political correspondent Maggie Haberman weighed in on the relationship between President-elect Trump and billionaire Elon Musk on Wednesday, indicating that because of its uniqueness, the partnership could "last for quite some time.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: La inteligencia artificial trasciende al espacio
item.description: Investigadores del grupo AIDA procedentes de la Universidad Politécnica de Madrid (UPM) han plantado cara a problemas tradicionales del sector aeroespacial gracias a la innovación tecnológica.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: FTC opens antitrust investigation into Microsoft’s cloud, AI, and cybersecurity practices
item.description: The US Federal Trade Commission (FTC) has launched an antitrust investigation into Microsoft, scrutinizing its cloud computing, software licensing, cybersecurity, and AI businesses. The inquiry follows over a year of informal interviews with competitors and business partners, Bloomberg reported.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Paso adelante en el desarrollo de los modelos virtuales de las presas de la Confederación Hidrográfica del Guadiana
item.description: La Secretaría de Estado de Medioambiente ha adjudicado a la UTE conformada por Sener y Medical el lote número seis del contrato para la Implementación de Metodología BIM.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Cloud providers turn to custom chips to meet high demand
item.description: Squeezed between AI-driven demand for ever-faster computing, and shortages of the GPUs used to accelerate those workloads, hyperscalers are designing custom silicon for specific workloads to further improve performance while cutting costs.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Copilot Studio Agents get a major upgrade via Microsoft 365 Copilot
item.description: Microsoft Ignite 2024 put an end to Microsoft’s dalliance with chatbots. Not because the company is walking away from natural language interfaces, but because it’s taking what it learned with its first Copilots and refocusing on tangible productivity gains from large language models (LLMs).
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Fox host: Podcasters like Rogan have 'earned' seats in White House briefing room
item.description: Fox News host Will Cain said popular podcasters like Joe Rogan have “earned” seats in the White House briefing room. When discussing the potential for a shake-up in the James S.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Australia's social media ban for kids is closer to becoming law
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Australia’s House of Representatives on Wednesday passed a bill that would ban children younger than 16 years old from social media, leaving it to the Senate to finalize the world-first law.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Talk in 2 languages with Apple Watch's real-time translation
item.description: Apple Watch's Translate app gives you your own personal interpreter, allowing you to have live two-way conversations in up to 20 different languages.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Federal prosecutors seek records from company that deployed AI weapons scanner on NYC subway
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Federal investigators in New York are seeking records from the manufacturer of an AI-powered weapons scanner that was briefly deployed this summer in New York City’s subway system.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: This free time-zone conversion tool blows other clock apps out of the water
item.description: You’d think by this point in our lives, we’d have the whole time-zone-conversion thing figured out. It isn’t all that complicated, right?! And yet—well, trying to keep such calculations straight often feels like performing advanced algebra.
item.dc:creator: JR Raphael, Fast Company

item.title: Interpol clamps down on cybercrime and arrests over 1,000 suspects in Africa
item.description: DAKAR, Senegal (AP) — Interpol arrested 1,006 suspects in Africa during a massive two-month operation, clamping down on cybercrime that left tens of thousands of victims, including some who were trafficked, and produced millions in financial damages, the global police organization said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: MARK BANCHEREAU, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Build generative AI pipelines without the infrastructure headache
item.description: While creating a basic ChatGPT prototype might take a weekend, developing production-ready generative AI systems that securely handle enterprise data presents significantly greater engineering challenges.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: USPTO petitioned to cancel Oracle’s JavaScript trademark
item.description: Deno Land, maker of the Deno runtime for JavaScript, has petitioned the United States Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO) to cancel Oracle’s ownership of the JavaScript trademark.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Free travel planner? Use AI for your next trip
item.description: I’m going to Europe soon, and planning my trip was a breeze. Yes, really! AI did a big chunk of the work for me — and it can help you plan your next getaway, too.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rethinking defense technology: A blueprint for US success in a complex global landscape
item.description: The Defense Department has made efforts to enhance its AI capabilities through the AI Adoption Strategy. The post Rethinking defense technology: A blueprint for US success in a complex global landscape first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Is Outlook down? Thousands of Microsoft 365 users report outage issues
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Thousands of Microsoft 365 customers worldwide reported having issues with services like Outlook and Teams on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Don’t get caught in the 'Apple ID suspended' phishing scam
item.description: Even the most tech-savvy computer users have to think twice with some of the clever phishing emails scammers are coming up with these days.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
